prs_inspected.title: arch: Phase 1b-A — ReplayHarness unified dispatch layer
prs_inspected.reason: architecture-unification requires human review; mergeable_state: unstable

papers_reviewed.title: The Online Pause and Resume Problem: Optimal Algorithms and Carbon-Aware Load Shifting
papers_reviewed.key_finding: O(log T) regret bound for pure temporal shifting — our +11.1% likely near achievable limit

papers_reviewed.title: GreenLLM: SLO-Aware Dynamic Frequency Scaling for Energy-Efficient LLM Serving
papers_reviewed.key_finding: 34% energy reduction via DVFS, orthogonal to temporal shifting
papers_reviewed.reason: requires per-GPU power telemetry not in public benchmarks

papers_reviewed.title: CarbonClipper — ST-CLIP: Spatiotemporal Online Allocation with Deadline Constraints
papers_reviewed.reason: requires multi-datacenter spatial dimension not in current Aurelius model

papers_reviewed.title: Adaptively Robust LLM Inference (conformal adaptive alpha)
papers_reviewed.application: conformal arrival-rate bounds for OSOTSS (different from prior token-length use)

papers_reviewed.title: Queueing + Predictions for LLMs
papers_reviewed.application: historical-variance margin for arrival-rate uncertainty in replica scaling
papers_reviewed.note: prior review was for token-length SRTF (null); this review is for arrival-rate replica scaling (different domain)

post_five_failure_experiments.name: Conformal Arrival-Rate Bounds for OSOTSS
post_five_failure_experiments.mechanism: abs-conformal upper bound on arrival rate, provision for q_alpha * sigma_arrivals above EWMA
post_five_failure_experiments.decision_changed: replica count per tick (OSOTSS mode in ReplicaScalingPolicy)
post_five_failure_experiments.expected_kpi_mechanism: closes BurstGPT 15-request gap by catching burst ticks with upper-bound provisioning
post_five_failure_experiments.risk: over-provisioning on non-burst ticks may increase cost

post_five_failure_experiments.name: GreenLLM DVFS Integration
post_five_failure_experiments.mechanism: dynamic GPU frequency scaling during batch job execution
post_five_failure_experiments.prerequisite: per-GPU power telemetry (not in current public benchmarks)
